description: Generic dropdown select component supporting typed options (string, int, Guid), label, placeholder, error/help text, and manual option rendering via ChildContent.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder option shown when no value is selected.

parameters.name: HelpText
parameters.description: Help text shown below the select when no error is present.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: Typed option list. When provided, <option> elements are generated automatically.

examples.title: Select with typed options
examples.code: <TmSelect TValue="string" @bind-Value="selectedCountry" Label="Country" Placeholder="Choose a country" Options="@countryOptions" />

examples.title: Select with error
examples.code: <TmSelect TValue="int" @bind-Value="selectedId" Label="Category" Error="Please select a category" Options="@categoryOptions" />
